languages.text: "Не теряй веру, Вего-Ан. {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница} и так сделал{mf||а} для нас слишком много. На новых землях мы сможем о себе позаботиться сами".

traits.locale_text: "Не теряй веру, Вего-Ан. {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница} и так сделал{mf||а} для нас слишком много. На новых землях мы сможем о себе позаботиться сами".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "Не теряй веру, Вего-Ан. {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница} и так сделал{mf||а} для нас слишком много. На новых землях мы сможем о себе позаботиться сами".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "Do not lose faith, Vego-An. The Heavenly Envoy has already done too much. We will be able to take care of ourselves in the new land."
languages.original_text: "Не теряй веру, Вего-Ан. {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница} и так сделал{mf||а} для нас слишком много. На новых землях мы сможем о себе позаботиться сами".

traits.locale_text: "Do not lose faith, Vego-An. The Heavenly Envoy has already done too much. We will be able to take care of ourselves in the new land."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "Do not lose faith, Vego-An. The Heavenly Envoy has already done too much. We will be able to take care of ourselves in the new land."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "Do not lose faith, Vego-An. The Heavenly Envoy has already done too much. We will be able to take care of ourselves in the new land."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "Verliere nicht den Glauben, Vego-An. Der himmlische Gesandte hat schon zu viel getan. Wir werden in der Lage sein, in dem neuen Land auf uns selbst aufzupassen."
languages.original_text: "Do not lose faith, Vego-An. The Heavenly Envoy has already done too much. We will be able to take care of ourselves in the new land."

languages.text: "Ne perds pas confiance, Vego-An. L'Envoyé céleste en a déjà trop fait. Nous saurons nous débrouiller seuls dans ce nouveau pays."
languages.original_text: "Do not lose faith, Vego-An. The Heavenly Envoy has already done too much. We will be able to take care of ourselves in the new land."

languages.text: "不要失去信心，织女安。天国使者已经做了太多。我们会在新的土地上照顾好自己的。"
languages.original_text: "Do not lose faith, Vego-An. The Heavenly Envoy has already done too much. We will be able to take care of ourselves in the new land."

languages.text: "No pierdas la fe, Vego-An. El Enviado Celestial ya ha hecho demasiado. Podremos cuidar de nosotros mismos en la nueva tierra".
languages.original_text: "Do not lose faith, Vego-An. The Heavenly Envoy has already done too much. We will be able to take care of ourselves in the new land."

languages.text: "ベゴ＝アン、信頼を失ってはいけない。天の使いはすでに多くのことを成し遂げている。新天地でも自分たちのことは自分たちでできるだろう。"
languages.original_text: "Do not lose faith, Vego-An. The Heavenly Envoy has already done too much. We will be able to take care of ourselves in the new land."

languages.text: "İnancını kaybetme Vego-An. Göksel Elçi zaten çok şey yaptı. Yeni topraklarda kendi başımızın çaresine bakabileceğiz."
languages.original_text: "Do not lose faith, Vego-An. The Heavenly Envoy has already done too much. We will be able to take care of ourselves in the new land."
